chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1144 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 10-10-2023 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner withdraws this petition through statement, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
